Pulse UI kit — dashboard (local only, no CDN)
=============================================

Distribution / reuse
--------------------
  Run:  python build-dist.py
  Output folder:  dist/pulse-ui-kit/  (README, CSS, JS, examples/, source/lottie/)
  npm:  package.json at repo root references dist/pulse-ui-kit for `npm pack` / private registry.

Run the full app with these local files (no CDN):

  0. index.html       — marketing landing (hero + Landing Page.json; app icon; Footer.json via PulseUI.initFooterLottie on #lottie-landing-footer).
  1. dashboard.html   — complete markup: login shell, dashboard frame, all pages.
  2. pulse-ui.css     — tokens, layout, motion, components (dashboard + landing).
  3. pulse-ui.js      — embedded Lottie data (__LOTTIE_DASHBOARD__, __LOTTIE_INPUT_FIELD__, __LOTTIE_LANDING_PAGE__, __LOTTIE_APP_ICON__, __LOTTIE_LOGIN_SCREEN__, __LOTTIE_FOOTER__)
                        + PulseUI runtime (router, header, fields, loaders).
  4. min.js           — lottie-web 5.12.2 build you saved locally (same folder as the HTML).
  5. profile-lottie-data.js + profile.js — header user menu + Profile.json Lottie (dashboard.html only).

file:// in an embedded preview (iframe)
----------------------------------------
  For file:// URLs the router avoids history.replaceState and keeps the hash route in memory
  (avoids console noise in embedded previews and iframe/opaque-origin cases). Sidebar + login still work.
  For normal address-bar URLs and http://localhost, real hash/history is used.

  If anything still misbehaves, open the HTML in a normal browser tab or run:
    python -m http.server 8080
  then open http://localhost:8080/dashboard.html

Regenerate pulse-ui.js after JSON changes
-----------------------------------------
  Source JSON (edit then re-embed):

    Data Dashboard.json              → dashboard-lottie-data.js (window.__LOTTIE_DASHBOARD__)
    Input Field - UX in Motion.json  → input-field-lottie-data.js (window.__LOTTIE_INPUT_FIELD__)
    Landing Page.json                → landing-page-lottie-data.js (window.__LOTTIE_LANDING_PAGE__)
    icon.json                        → icon-lottie-data.js (window.__LOTTIE_APP_ICON__, dashboard sidebar)
    Login Screen.json                → login-screen-lottie-data.js (window.__LOTTIE_LOGIN_SCREEN__, #login view)
    Footer.json                      → footer-lottie-data.js (window.__LOTTIE_FOOTER__, app footer strip)
    Profile.json                     → profile-lottie-data.js (window.__LOTTIE_PROFILE__, dashboard header)

  Merge into pulse-ui.js: run merge-pulse-ui.py (order: dashboard, input-field, landing, icon, login-screen, footer, pulse-ui.runtime.js).

  pulse-ui.runtime.js is the logic-only copy of PulseUI (no embedded JSON).

Smaller integration (no embedded Lottie)
----------------------------------------
  Use pulse-ui.runtime.js + the *-lottie-data.js scripts (dashboard, input-field, landing, icon, login-screen, footer) before min.js, then PulseUI.init() or initLandingPageLottie() on the landing page.

PulseUI.init(options)
---------------------
  See JSDoc in pulse-ui.runtime.js / pulse-ui.js footer. Pass false to skip modules
  or objects to override ids / URLs.
